alkylation reagent: fixed modification: alkylation of Cys by IAA
cleavage agent: the proteins were digested in gel using trypsin (modified sequencing purity, Promega)
collision energy: 20%, 25% and 35% for Orbitrap Exploris 480 and 22%, 27% and 30% for Q-Exactive HF
with stepped higher-energy collision-induced dissociation (HCD) and normalized collision energies (20%, 25% and 35% for Orbitrap Exploris 480 and 22%, 27% and 30% for Q-Exactive HF)
enrichment method: the chloroplast lysate was mixed overnight at 4 °C with heparin resin equilibrated
fractionation method: The fractions were then subjected to SDS-PAGE and Western blot analyses
instrument: analyzed by online nano-liquid chromatography coupled with MS/MS (Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano and Q-Exactive Plus, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: We used a MS-based label-free quantitative proteomic analysis
